First Postmortem Report And Account Of Linda Harrington And Petition For Settlement Thereof.
Off Calendar Feb-15-2011 Continued To Mar-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Ottonello for and with Linda Harrington (Trustee). Stephanie Hess for Dan Dickman (Objector).

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Trustee's fees that have been paid, the additional Trustee's fees being requested, information being provided with regard to the work that has been performed, whether an accounting should/should not be filed and whether Trustee's Attorney's fees should be paid. The Court suggested mediation. Ms. Hess' position is that mediation is premature at this point. The matter was continued to March 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see what supplemental information is filed with regard to the first report and account of Trustee. Mr. Otonello is to file the supplemental declaration by February 25, 2011. Ms. Hess is to file the response by March 9, 2011.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

First Postmortem Report And Account Of Linda Harrington And Petition For Settlement Thereof.
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Continued To Feb-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
